name: digital-marketing-pro
description: The most comprehensive open-source AI marketing plugin — 153 skills, 25 specialist agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Living Project Instruction File. Built for marketing agencies, in-house teams running 50–200 brands, and consultancies. EU AI Act Article 50 ready (C2PA content provenance signing). 6-platform AEO/GEO audit including Google AI Mode. 16 privacy-law jurisdictions. 14 HTTP MCP connectors (opt-in via .mcp.json.connectors-reference). 77 Python scripts. v3.8.0 (2026-05-27): native OpenAI Codex manifest with real published schema (replaces the invented schema correctly removed in v3.7.13). Same skills/ directory shared with .claude-plugin/ and gemini-extension.json (Agent Skills open standard).

interface.shortDescription: End-to-end AI marketing engagement methodology — 12-Part Strategy Flow, EU AI Act Article 50 ready, 6-platform AEO/GEO audit.
interface.longDescription: Digital Marketing Pro brings a canonical 12-Part Strategy Flow to OpenAI Codex via 153 portable Agent Skills. Run a full brand engagement (Stone-vs-Opinion intake → External Research → Four Core Documents → Competitive/Customer/Market analysis → Client Validation → Selective v2 re-runs → Preparation → Growth Plan + Yearly Planner → Channel fan-out → Execution artefacts → Creative briefs → Continuous improvement). Skills are platform-portable — same SKILL.md format used by Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot CLI. 14 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors (Slack, HubSpot, Notion, Stripe, Gmail, Google Calendar, Ahrefs, SimilarWeb, Klaviyo, Amplitude, Canva, Figma, Asana, Webflow) connect only when env vars are configured — zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence. Built for marketing agencies, in-house teams running 50–200 brands, and consultancies. EU AI Act Article 50 ready (C2PA content provenance signing end-to-end tested against c2pa-python 0.32).
defaultPrompt: Set up a new brand for digital marketing engagement.
Run a full 12-Part Strategy Flow for the brand.
Run a 6-platform AEO/GEO audit for the brand's website.
Build a campaign plan with budget, timeline, and KPIs.
Generate an executive dashboard for the current client.
